recommendations.title: The Lost Husband
recommendations.overview: Trying to put her life back together after the death of her husband, Libby and her children move to her estranged Aunt's goat farm in central Texas.

recommendations.title: Possum
recommendations.overview: A disgraced children's puppeteer returns to his childhood home and is forced to confront his wicked stepfather and the secrets that have tortured him his entire life.

recommendations.title: Incendiary
recommendations.overview: A woman's life is torn apart when her husband and infant son are killed in a suicide bombing at a soccer match.

recommendations.title: Talk to Her
recommendations.overview: Two men share an odd friendship while they care for two women who are both in deep comas.

recommendations.title: A Time for Drunken Horses
recommendations.overview: After their father dies, a family of five children are forced to survive on their own in a Kurdish village on the border of Iran and Iraq.
